identity.name: Nayan Jeet Dewri
identity.headline: I build high-confidence automation systems that keep data products stable at release speed.
identity.summary: Automation leader with 6+ years of experience designing resilient Python QA systems across SQL engines, APIs, and data-heavy UI workflows. Deep execution in Playwright, Pytest, BDD, SQL validation, and Kafka-backed streaming checks.

about.narrative: I turn flaky, manual-heavy QA into deterministic systems teams can trust. My approach combines robust test architecture, domain-aware validation logic, and close collaboration with product and engineering to cut regression load while accelerating confident releases.
focusAreas: Python-driven test architecture for SQL and API platforms
Kinetica SQL correctness validation across edge-case datasets
UI workflow automation with Playwright for production confidence
Streaming and ingestion validation with Apache Kafka and Confluent Kafka
Mentoring engineers and scaling test ownership across teams

metrics.label: Years in Automation
metrics.description: Hands-on automation engineering across SQL, API, UI, and data streams.

metrics.label: Regression Effort Reduced
metrics.description: Reduced manual regression effort by approximately 40-50% through scaled frameworks.

metrics.label: Faster Feedback Cycles
metrics.description: Shortened feedback loops by aligning test strategy with product and engineering teams.

metrics.label: Critical API Coverage
metrics.description: Drove automated test coverage for critical endpoints to approximately 80%.

experience.summary: Leading end-to-end automation strategy for Kinetica SQL engine, APIs, and Workbench UI.
achievements: Built Python, Pytest, BDD, and Playwright frameworks that cut manual regression by approximately 40-50%.
Mentored 2-3 engineers on automation design, debugging, and review quality to reduce rework time.
Aligned testing with product and dev teams through JIRA-driven tracking and tighter specification reviews, improving feedback cycles by approximately 30%.

experience.summary: Expanded SQL, UI, and AI-query validation coverage for Kinetica features and workflows.
achievements: Designed comprehensive SQL validation for ANTI, SEMI, and ASOF joins, plus built-ins such as PREDICT and OUTLIERS.
Implemented SQL-GPT validation to verify prompt-to-query accuracy and result consistency.
Built robust Playwright coverage for user-facing Workbench flows to raise release confidence.
Automated ingestion and export validation using Apache Kafka, Confluent Kafka, and Azure Blob Storage.

experience.summary: Scaled REST API automation and BDD test specifications for maintainable platform quality.
achievements: Implemented Pytest + Pytest-BDD suites for Kinetica REST APIs with clear and maintainable specs.
Increased automated test coverage of critical API endpoints to approximately 80%, reducing manual validation load.

experience.summary: Built automation utilities and migration validation workflows across data platforms.
achievements: Developed Python and Java tools for multi-sheet Excel comparison, data processing, and C-code generation.
Contributed testing and visualization tooling with Pytest, matplotlib, and Qt/QML.
Verified SQL-based migration integrity using HiveQL, Spark, and Airflow.
Contributed to development and maintenance of the iOS app PFactor.

projects.name: Kinetica SQL Engine Validation
projects.description: Created deep SQL test coverage for Kinetica-native features including ANTI, SEMI, ASOF joins, and ML-focused built-ins.
projects.impact: Improved edge-case correctness and reduced production query risk in large datasets.

projects.name: SQL-GPT Query Validation
projects.description: Implemented validation framework for AI-assisted prompt-to-query generation and result consistency checks.
projects.impact: Raised trust in AI-generated SQL workflows by validating correctness before release.

projects.name: Workbench UI Automation
projects.description: Built a robust Playwright suite covering critical user-facing workbench workflows.
projects.impact: Increased release confidence and reduced UI regression risk.

projects.name: Kafka and Ingestion Data Validation
projects.description: Automated validation for ingestion/export pipelines using Apache Kafka, Confluent Kafka, and Azure Blob storage.
projects.impact: Improved data transfer reliability and surfaced stream defects earlier.

projects.name: REST API BDD Coverage Expansion
projects.description: Expanded API test architecture with Pytest-BDD for maintainable behavior-level specs.
projects.impact: Pushed critical endpoint automation to approximately 80% coverage.

projects.name: Migration and Data Integrity Automation
projects.description: Validated SQL migration integrity using HiveQL, Spark, and Airflow-backed workflows.
projects.impact: Reduced migration risk for internal platform projects.

education.degree: Bachelor of Technology in Information Technology

contact.availability: Open to Automation QA leadership and high-scale data platform quality engineering roles.
